Contact

You can email me at [email protected]k, and your email will be processed as soon as possible. You can alternatively fill out the form below.

Before we can can process your enquiry, please check that you are one of my constituents.

Is Jake my MP? >

Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.
Name *

You should also ensure that you have:

  • Provided your full name.
  • Provided your full postal address including post code.
  • Provided a contact telephone number and an email address if you have one.

IMPORTANT: If you have not included this information, please re-send your email as I am unable to process your enquiry without it.

Email

[email protected]

Telephone

01909 384605

Postal Address

39 Laughton Road, Dinnington, S25 2PN

Please note: The office is appointment only. If you require an appointment, please fill out the form above or email the office directly using [email protected]
